name: Health
description: An early concept mentioned in a knowledge text: Health.

open_questions.question: Health 是什么？它和当前学习主题有什么关系？
Health 被 Allergy 等概念通过“can_affect”联系起来。这说明 Health 在这些关系里扮演什么角色？
open_questions.last_answer: Allergy is not a fruit. Allergy is a body reaction to some substances. Mango, pollen, medicine, or other foods may trigger Allergy. Allergy can affect health, but severity varies by person.

open_questions.question: Health 被 Digestion 等概念通过“related-to”联系起来。这说明 Health 在这些关系里扮演什么角色？
open_questions.last_answer: Digestion is not a fruit. Digestion is a body process for handling food and nutrients. DietaryFiber supports Digestion. Digestion is related to Health.

open_questions.question: Health 被 Immunity, Nutrient, VitaminC 等概念通过“supports”联系起来。这说明 Health 在这些关系里扮演什么角色？
open_questions.last_answer: VitaminC is a nutrient, not a fruit. Many fruits contain VitaminC. VitaminC supports Immunity and helps maintain Health.

open_questions.question: Health is-not-a Fruit 这件事为什么重要？它会带来什么影响？
open_questions.inferred_answer: Health is-not-a Fruit 已由关系证据回答。

open_questions.question: Fruit 是什么？它有哪些关键特性？
Health 是不是一种 Fruit，还是和 Fruit 不同？
open_questions.last_answer: Health is not a fruit. Health is a condition of the body. Nutrient is related to Health. Digestion is related to Health. Immunity is related to Health. Energy is related to Health.

open_questions.question: Health 被 Energy, Digestion 等概念通过“related-to”联系起来。这说明 Health 在这些关系里扮演什么角色？
open_questions.last_answer: Digestion is not a fruit. Digestion is a body process for handling food and nutrients. DietaryFiber supports Digestion. Digestion is related to Health.

open_questions.question: Health 是不是一种 Nutrient，还是和 Nutrient 不同？
open_questions.last_answer: Nutrient is not a fruit. Nutrient is a general category for substances that support BodyFunction and Health. Vitamin is a nutrient. Mineral is a nutrient. DietaryFiber is a nutrient. Potassium is a nutrient.
